programme.desc: Eric decides to try being a chiropractor but comes to his senses when he nearly cripples Donna.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: In order for Eric to graduate he must take a P.E. class, but when he learns that Casey Kelso is the gym coach, his nerves get the best of him.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric learns that his parents have spent all of his college savings, so he must find a way to finance the next four years.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim and Jill (Tim Allen, Patricia Richardson) must make a parenting decision when Mark (Taran Noah Smith) is accused of stealing a knife.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) plays matchmaker and introduces Wilson (Earl Hindman) to one of her professors (Beth Dixon).

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Bob enlists Tunde's help to buy an engagement ring, but his plans to propose to Abishola are upended by her belief that a traditional marriage is more trouble than it's worth.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.sub-title: Paris Is for Lovers, Not Mothers
programme.desc: Kemi leans on Abishola after an argument with Chukwuemeka, disrupting her and Bob's engagement celebration; Dottie gives Douglas a new job at MaxDot.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: In an effort to outdo Cheryl's story about meeting Oprah, Jim makes up a story about his construction office catching fire.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim helps Andy pick up a beautiful woman at the bar, but she turns out to be crazy.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: In the wake of the pandemic, Mike and Kristin are forced to make some tough business decisions involving Outdoor Man; Jen helps Mandy get organized.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike's willpower is put to the test when Vanessa challenges him to go vegetarian for a week; Ed trolls ventriloquist Jeff Dunham on social media; Mandy and Kyle move into Kristin and Ryan's guest house.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: On the eve of her birthday, Vanessa refuses to believe that she needs to slow down, going above and beyond on her grandma responsibilities; Joe puts Mike's friendship to the test.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mandy and Kyle decide to have a home birth -- at Mike and Vanessa's; Ryan and Chuck team up to construct a state-of-the-art crib.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam can't stop being overprotective when Kate is asked out on her first date; Lowell helps Don buy an anniversary gift for Marcy.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam's parents make an unannounced visit and reveal surprising plans for their future living arrangements.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim and Cheryl attempt to plan for some romantic time alone, but when the kids demand all of her attention, Jim plans to meet Cheryl for a tryst in the airport lounge.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: While Cheryl is still in Florida, Jim donates all of the kids' old furniture and clothes to charity to clear the garage for a cigar lounge; Cheryl calls Jim with a special announcement.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: With Cheryl on bed rest, Jim hosts Gracie's doll-themed party, turning the girly tea party into a wild squirt-gun fight.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim tries to convince Cheryl that it was her idea to turn the basement into a media room instead of a room for Gracie and Ruby, blaming her forgetfulness on pregnancy.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: The Taylor family stays at a resort for the wedding of Jill's (Patricia Richardson) cousin. With Tim Allen.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) must choose between his career and friendship when his new boss (guest star Charlie Robinson) wants to ax Al (Richard Karn).

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) joins Jill's (Patricia Richardson) literary group when he feels threatened by her male classmate.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill's (Patricia Richardson) surprise 40th birthday party may be ruined by her search for a piano from her youth. With Tim Allen.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) unwittingly creates marital strife for the father (guest star Mark L. Taylor) of Randy's girlfriend (guest star Kimberly Cullum).

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Brad (Zachery Ty Bryan) throws a Halloween party at home without his parents' (Tim Allen, Patricia Richardson) permission.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim is pressured into standing up to Jill after he buys expensive sports tickets without consulting her.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Randy (Jonathan Taylor Thomas) won't admit his fears when Jill and Tim (Patricia Richardson, Tim Allen) convert the basement into his bedroom.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Bud makes Tim entertain a station manager during the Taylors' romantic getaway.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) isn't as thrilled as Tim (Tim Allen) when he learns he will be receiving an honorary doctorate degree.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) is uncomfortable discussing personal matters with his visiting mother (guest star Bonnie Bartlett).

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim and Al (Tim Allen, Richard Karn) fret over being stranded in a small-town airport on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: The high-school's overbearing music teacher (Roger Daltrey) prepares the gang for the annual choral concert.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric can't get over Donna, so he confronts Casey (guest star Luke Wilson), who just plans to use her and move on.

programme.title: Nature
programme.sub-title: Raptors: A Fistful of Daggers: Extreme Lives
programme.desc: From snowy owls in the high Arctic to honey buzzards raiding hornet nests in Taiwan, a look at the extreme ways in which raptors conquer the toughest habitats on Earth.

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: Understanding how the brain shapes reality, including the tricks and shortcuts the brain takes to keep a person alive; with neuroscientist Heather Berlin.

programme.title: Our New World
programme.desc: Four people on four continents face environmental change driven by climate change; as resources grow scarce, they witness shifts in wildlife behavior.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An Edgar Allan Poe daguerreotype; a Teco collection circa 1905; a 1907 Frank Lloyd Wright archive.

programme.title: Henry David Thoreau
programme.desc: Thoreau returns to society, taking on roles as surveyor, scientist and abolitionist, and makes two more Maine trips; Thoreau writes with renewed energy as he faces a lifelong illness.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Actresses Debra Messing and Melanie Lynskey explore the stories of their ancestors whose bold decisions reshaped their families.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: When Carl Met George; D.W. Swims With the Fishes
programme.desc: George spends time with his new friend, Carl, who has Asperger's syndrome; D.W. and James ask their siblings to coach them through the pre-school swim meet.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The team learns about friction and how to slow down a moving object when a masked villain takes over the Mobile Unit van's computer.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: On their annual laundry day, the Kratt brothers disagree on whether blue oceans or green forests are better; Aviva demonstrates how oceans and forests work together.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: It's an exciting day for Lily and her family when they move into their new house.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: Everett's Swim Lesson; Miss Emmaline's New Beginning
programme.desc: Everett faces his fear of water by taking a swimming lesson; Lyla doesn't want Miss Emmaline to move.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: Show and Smell; The Campfire Conundrum
programme.desc: Carl takes his friends on an "Amazing Smell Tour of Fuzzytown," but Lotta doesn't agree with Carl's list of the best smells; Carl and his friends go on a camping trip.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Juan Carlos Visits the Neighborhood; Daniel Shows Juan Carlos the Clock Factory
